Name: FEdGraphPinType
Description: Struct used to define the type of information carried on this pin

Variables.Name: PinValueType
Variables.Description: Data used to determine value types when bIsMap is true

Variables.Name: bIsArray_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: DEPRECATED(4.17) Whether or not this pin represents an array of values

Variables.Name: bIsReference
Variables.Description: Whether or not this pin is a value passed by reference or not

Variables.Name: bIsConst
Variables.Description: Whether or not this pin is a immutable const value

Variables.Name: bIsWeakPointer
Variables.Description: Whether or not this is a weak reference
